titleStmt.title: SII 25.182: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 182. (A.R. No. 182 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.

This inscription does not furnish any praśasti of the king. The details of date viz., Kaṉṉi śu 5, Monday and Anusha correspond to the 1st September 1242 A.D., f.d.n. 22. On grounds of palaeography the king may be identified with Rājarāja III.

It records the order of royal official or chief Araiyaṉ Nāḍuḍaiyāṉ Viḻuppādirāyaṉ, the headman of Śiṟṟārkāḍu in Pāṇḍikulāśani-vaḷanāḍu issued to the officers of the temple of Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār relating to the grant of one vēli of land at Sundaraśōḻapuram as tirunāmattukkāṇi and as ūrkkīḻ-iṟaiyili for the food-offerings to the diety during the midday worship. The gift land is stated to be the kāṇi (hereditary right) of the donor (i.e., the chief).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājarāja
devarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 6 Āvati netirāmā
ṇṭu kaṉṉiṉāyaṟṟup pūrvvapakṣattu pañcami
yum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aniḻattu nāḷ
pāṇṭi kulācanivaḷanāṭṭuc ciṟṟāṟ kāṭukiḻāṉ Ara
yaṉ nāṭuṭaiyāṉ viḻappāthirājaṉ Olai . Uṭai
yār tiruvucāttānamuṭaiyar koyil tāṉattaār kaṇ
ṭu cuntaracoḻapurattu Eṉ kāṇiyāna nilattile I
t tiruvucāttānamuṭaiya nāyanārkku tirunāmattukkāṇi
Ākak kuṭuttapaṭi nilam veliyum 10 7 vatu mutal
tirunāmattukkāṇi Ākak kaikkoṇṭu Anupavi
paṇṇuvate
m Eḻuttu ta Olaikku Ivar pāvattu Ivar ma
kanār kaṭakkattuppiḷḷaiyāṉa konārum
I ra coḻapu
rattu Ūravarum Ūrkaṇakku kuṟukkaiyuṭaiyā
r kārai tiruvaraṅkapperumānum Eḻuttiṭṭa niyo
kappaṭi Ivvūr vaṭavayalil Ivar kāṇi Āna nila
ttu Innāyanārkku Uccic cantiyil nāṭuṭaiyārā
na viḻuppādhirājar perāl tirumantiraponakama
mutu ceytaruḷakkaṭavatāka Ūrkiḻiṟaiyiliyā
ka Iṭṭa Innilam velikkum vaṭavayali
l viṭṭa nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai nīr ttu I(ḷa)
ṟaiyili nilattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai ti
rukkai vaḻakkappaṟṟukkum viyāpāra paṟṟukkum
vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Āḻvār tiruvi
ṭaiyāṭṭattukku Okkum vaṭapāṟkellai E
ṟṟukkulaikkut teṟkkut teṟkum Āka Icai
nta perunāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa O na
ṭi taṭipalavāl rūpāy(1/2)� mukkāl 2 I
n nilam Araiye kāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikai
kkiḻ mukkāle Iraṇṭumāvum Akaḷaṅkap perā
ṟṟukku meṟkumiṉaṉ Iṟaivāḷeṉṟu pe
r kūvappaṭṭa nilattu meṟkaṭaiya rūpāy In
nilam mukkāṇic cinnattukkum kiḻpāṟkellai
āṭu(k)kiṉṟān nilattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkel
lai meṟpaṭiyār nilattukku vaṭakkum melpā
ṟkellai macānapūmikkup pokiṟa Oḻukkaik
ku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai meṟpaṭikkup po
kiṟa Oḻukkaikkut teṟkkum Āka Icainta peru
nānkellaikku naruvupaṭṭa nilam mukkāṇic cinnamum Ā
ka rūpāy (1/2)� Innilam Araiye mākkāṇiyil vi
rivinpaṭi rūpāy � li Innilam veliyum Irupat
teḻāvatu kār mutal Ūrkeḻ Iṟaiyiliyākavum
In nilattu tirap maṭakku Ūrile Eṟṟi Iṟukkavum I
n nilattu Antarāyam Uṟaināḻi koyiṟṟamappeṟu nakara
viniyokam Uḷḷiṭṭa kuṭimaiviṟkaṅkaḷum ninaip
vaṟkaṅkaḷum Ūrile Eṟṟi Iṟukka
kaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi cantirātitavaṟ cel
lakkaṭavetākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Ūrkkiḻaṟai
yili ceytu Ippaṭi tirukkaṟṟaḷiyile veṭṭik
koḷḷak kaṭavatākavum connom Ippaṭik
ku Ivai ciṟṟampala yān nakkaṉ cā
ttānāna coḻakon Eḻuttu Enṟum Ivai kāliṅkarāyan Eḻuttu Enṟum Ivai Āṉāṅkūr Uṭaiyāṉ periyān nampiyāḻvānāṉa tennava varayaṉ Eḻuttu Enṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai kānūruḷaṭayāṉ vaicirāvaṇan Eḻuttu
nṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai Ālaṅkuṭaiyān Irācarācamuventaveḷān Eḻuttu Enṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai kaṇṭiyūr Uṭaiyāṉ tirunāṭuṭaiyān tillaimuvāyirattoruvan Eḻuttenṟum § Ippaṭikkiḷava neṭṭuruṭaiyān Uṭaiyān pañcavan Eḻu
ttu Enṟum § Ippaṭikku Ivai Ivvūr karaṇattān kuṟukkaiyuṭaiyān kāraitiruvaraṅkapperumān Eḻuttu Enṟum Eḻutiṉa cātanalpaṭi svastiśrī
Digital edition of SII 25.182 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
